name: beadwork-skills
description: Claude Code skills for beadwork (bw — github.com/jallum/beadwork): walkthroughs explaining what bw is and how seven kinds of users use it through their AI assistants for agent memory and agent-to-agent communication, plus an install skill driven by Claude Code.

plugins.name: beadwork
plugins.description: Six skills: beadwork-overview (the seven-persona tour with SaaS-lock-in lead), beadwork-as-memory (durable memory deep-dive), beadwork-as-bus (multi-session specialist team coordination), beadwork-for-meta-analysis (an agent reading other agents' work), beadwork-for-decisions (decision logs / audit trails), beadwork-install (drives setup end-to-end).
